limitations: All current examples are synthetic and English-only.
The four-way ID split is family-disjoint but synthetic and still modest; confidence intervals remain wide.
The same development partition selects the model candidate and the abstention policy, so development-selection optimism remains possible.
OOD discrimination is measured only on balanced synthetic semantic, capability, and noise strata; broader domains can behave differently.
ID intervals cluster-resample held-out families and OOD intervals cluster-resample broader domains, but both have few independent clusters.
A training-only unigram baseline is reported because surface-label shortcuts remain a material benchmark risk.
The anti-shortcut contrast test is small, synthetic, and source-declared before the final run; it is not an external benchmark.
This classifier is not suitable for clinical, safety, employment, or other decisions about people.
